title: 창립
description: 성균관대학교 명륜캠퍼스에서 15개국 전문가가 참여한 창립총회 개최. 정관 심의·창립 선언.

title: 제1차 세미나
description: 라오스 루앙프라방에서 한국·베트남·라오스 전문가가 참가한 제1차 국제 세미나 개최.

title: 제2차 세미나 (예정)
description: 대한민국에서 제2차 국제 세미나 개최 예정.

title: Founding
description: The founding assembly was held at Sungkyunkwan University’s Humanities and Social Sciences Campus with experts from 15 countries, including a review of the bylaws and the founding declaration.

title: First International Seminar
description: The first international seminar was held in Luang Prabang, Laos, with experts from Korea, Vietnam, and Laos.

title: Second International Seminar (Upcoming)
description: The second international seminar is scheduled to take place in the Republic of Korea.
